content.en:
The Lord of Eternal Zero thought that he could slap this black abyss giant ape to death, but the slap didn't kill the other party.

Although he is said to be the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, his physical body is extremely powerful, but the will of the Origin Realm is sealed, and he cannot exert his strength, and he will not be able to use the magic of the other side, only the ancient technique.

Moreover, he hadn't even cast the Ancient Technique just now, he was just using an ordinary technique, so he didn't kill this Black Abyss Giant Ape.

Rumble!!!!

The Lord of Eternal Zero really made a move, and he used the ancient technique, and only then did he kill the black abyss giant ape.

Afterwards.

The Lord of Eternal Zero wandered around this treasure place again and came to the inner area.

And here, Ye Tian didn't kill all the creatures.

Therefore, the Lord of Eternal Zero encountered a black mist dragon, and he fought with it for a long time, but he couldn't help the other party.

In desperation, the Lord of Eternal Zero withdrew.

"This special treasure land is very strange, even the will of the Origin Realm can be sealed, without the help of the will, we can't even control the physical body, we can't exert our strength, it is difficult to enter the core area!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded and didn't say much.

And the Lord of Eternal Zero did not take any risks, and it would be too unjust if he fell in this treasure land.

Besides, the resources inside are useless to him, and there is no need for him to break in.

Moreover, except for the Origin Realm and Ye Tian, other Bone Transformation Realms couldn't fight that Black Mist Dragon at all, and they would be killed in an instant.

Of course.

They will also tell the lords about the situation of this treasure land, and if anyone wants to go in, then go in and try it, and he will not stop it.

Soon.

The other Venerable Lords of Guheng Mountain knew the benefits of this treasure land and were about to go in to take a look, but they escaped back one by one with heavy injuries and almost fell.

The point is, they didn't find any resources.

If there are many benefits, they will definitely find a way to take risks.

But they didn't see the benefits of resources, and they gradually gave up.

......

"Cultivating to the eighth bone transformation realm, it is difficult to improve to the ninth bone transformation realm in a short period of time!"

"The will has reached the will of the Origin Realm, and the resources in the treasure land have also been refined a lot, and it is difficult to continue to improve!"

"The golden body on the other side is completely full, and it is a complete golden body on the other side, and there is no way to continue to improve. "

"Even if you create a few more magical powers, you can't improve your strength. "

"My current cultivation has reached a limit!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

He felt that if he wanted to greatly improve his strength now, it seemed that he could only comprehend the rules of the origin on the other side.

"You have to use the high-grade eternal ancient gold to build a magic circle, and face the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, so that you can cultivate and realize the origin rules of the other side!"

And in order to do this, you must have such a method of building a circle.

And Gu Heng Mountain has such a formation.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to find the Lord of Eternal Zero.

In Guheng Mountain, only by looking for the deputy mountain master can you exchange for such a magic circle, and there is no way to exchange resources in the place.

Seeing that Ye Tian was coming, the Lord of Eternal Zero asked, "Lord of Endless, what's the matter?"

Ye Tian immediately said, "Lord of Eternal Zero, I want to exchange for an Origin Array!"

The Origin Circle was the circle he wanted to build, with the Eternal Gold as the base material plus some other precious materials.

"You want to exchange the Origin Array?" The Lord of Eternal Zero was a little surprised, but it was right to think about it carefully, Ye Tian's growth speed was too fast, and it was more reasonable to exchange the Origin Array now.

However, he said, "Endless Lord, you exchange the Origin Array, but Gu Heng Mountain doesn't have much top-grade Eternal Ancient Gold now, I'm afraid you won't be able to successfully build it." "

"Lord of Eternal Zero, I will collect the finest Eternal Ancient Gold myself. Ye Tiandao.

Seeing this, the Lord of Eternal Zero didn't say anything.

Then, he asked: "There are a total of six Origin Arrays in Ancient Heng Mountain, among which the lowest one requires a thousand pieces of high-grade eternal gold, and without one of them, it is impossible to build a Origin Array, once this Origin Array is completed, it can last for a hundred primeval epochs, and the highest one requires three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal gold, once it is completed, it can last for five hundred primeval epochs." "

"Lord of Eternal Zero, if you calculate it like this, the highest Origin Circle is more cost-effective!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!" the Lord of Eternal Zero nodded, "The highest Origin Array is indeed cost-effective, but it is quite easy to gather a thousand pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, but it is very difficult to gather three thousand six hundred pieces of Top-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!

"That's right!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, he directly said that he wanted to exchange for the highest level of the Origin Magic Circle.

"Lord of Eternal Zero, I want the highest level of the Origin Array!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero did not refuse, and quickly obtained the inheritance of the magic circle from the treasure house of Gu Heng Mountain and handed it to Ye Tian.

As for the contribution value of this magic circle, it was naturally directly deducted from Ye Tian's contribution value.

"Tailing Origin Array!"

After obtaining this Origin Array, Ye Tian took his leave.

After going back.

He was ready to set up this Origin Circle.

"It's a pity that this kind of Origin Array can only protect the origin of one person to comprehend the land of eternity, and no one more person can protect it. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Otherwise, he really wanted to build an Origin Magic Array, so that the human race would come to the Bone Transformation Realm to comprehend it, maybe he would have some understanding, which would be beneficial to his cultivation in the future.

But it can't be done.

The days that followed.

He had purchased the materials needed to build the Tailing Origin Array from various sources, and the inheritance was recorded above, and it was not extremely rare, and it was easier to collect than the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

Therefore, it only took him a while to successfully collect all the materials needed for the Tailing Origin Array.

"Start arranging the Tailing Origin Array!"

Ye Tian built it on Guheng Mountain, so it was safer, and no one would come to disturb him.

If it was built in the gap of the territorial sea boundary, if a certain Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor sensed it and directly drove him away, occupying the Tailing Origin Array, he would want to cry without tears, and even implicate the Terrans.

Therefore, it is still the best choice to build a magic circle in Guheng Mountain.

Airplanes!!!!!

Pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold were taken out by Ye Tian, and with other materials, they began to integrate into the formation base, and slowly built this magic circle in the way of the Tailing Origin Array.
